title: Homemade Mac and Cheese (Community Enhanced)
original_ingredients: 2.5 cups milk, or more as needed
salt and ground black pepper to taste
original_instructions: Gather all ingredients. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Grease an 8-inch square baking dish.

To make the macaroni and cheese: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add macaroni and simmer, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes; it will finish cooking in the oven. Drain and transfer to the prepared baking dish.
While the macaroni is cooking, melt 1/4 cup butter in a medium skillet over low heat. Whisk in flour and stir until the mixture becomes paste-like and light golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes.
Gradually whisk 2 ½ cups milk into the flour mixture, and bring to a simmer.

Stir in shredded Cheddar and finely grated Parmesan cheeses; season with salt and pepper. Cook and stir over low heat until cheese is melted and sauce has thickened, 3 to 5 minutes, adding up to 1/2 cup more milk if needed.
Pour cheese sauce over macaroni and stir until well combined.
Make the bread crumb topping: Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add bread crumbs; cook and stir until well coated and browned.
Spread bread crumbs over macaroni and cheese, then sprinkle with paprika.
Bake in the preheated oven until topping is golden brown and macaroni and cheese is gooey and bubbling, about 30 minutes.
ingredients: 2 cups milk and 0.5 cup heavy cream
1/2 cup finely grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 cup gouda, 1/2 cup Cheddar, 1 cup sharp Cheddar
salt and ground black pepper to taste
instructions: Gather all ingredients. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Grease an 8-inch square baking dish.

To make the macaroni and cheese: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add macaroni and simmer, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes; it will finish cooking in the oven. Drain and transfer to the prepared baking dish.
While the macaroni is cooking, melt 1/4 cup butter in a medium skillet over low heat. Whisk in flour and stir until the mixture becomes paste-like and light golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes.
Gradually whisk 2 ½ cups milk into the flour mixture, and bring to a simmer.

Stir in shredded Cheddar and finely grated Parmesan cheeses; season with salt and pepper. Cook and stir over low heat until cheese is melted and sauce has thickened, 3 to 5 minutes, adding up to 1/2 cup more milk if needed.
Pour cheese sauce over macaroni and stir until well combined.
Make the bread crumb topping: Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add bread crumbs; cook and stir until well coated and browned.
Spread bread crumbs over macaroni and cheese, then sprinkle with paprika.
Bake in the preheated oven until topping is golden brown and macaroni and cheese is gooey and bubbling, about 30 minutes.
Hit the broiler on high for 1-2 minutes and keep watch.

line_diffs.reasoning: Mixing milk with heavy cream adds richness and creaminess to the dish

source_review.text: Loved the recipe. My favorite. I did use the 1/2 c of Parmesan, 1/2 c gouda, 1/2 c Cheddar & 1 c sharp Cheddar. Came out great. I also used 3t butter & an extra 1/4 c (3/4 c total) of plain panko bread crumbs vs just bread crumbs. I also hit the broiler on high for 1-2 minutes & kept watch. A definite keeper.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Using a variety of cheeses can enhance flavor and texture

changes_made.to_text: 1/2 cup finely grated Parmesan cheese, 1/2 cup gouda, 1/2 cup Cheddar, 1 cup sharp Cheddar

source_review.text: I also mixed the milk with heavy cream, (so that I didn’t use all my husbands milk for morning coffee 😜,) and it was delicious. I have cheddar and mozzarella and it was so yummy. Also, I browned up some chop meat, onion, and garlic and some Italian seasoning and I will make it like this now every time!

modifications_applied.reasoning: Mixing milk with heavy cream adds richness and creaminess to the dish

description: Homemade mac and cheese made with tender macaroni pasta in a decadent creamy cheese sauce topped with bread crumbs and baked until bubbling and delicious.
